programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Mysteries
programme.desc: When a local waitress is found dead on the beach and a mysterious deposit appears in Zee's bank account, Martha's Vineyard proves to be all but the simple, scenic life Jeff Jackson was after.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's friend is hit by a car shortly after being notified of her sister's death.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The descendant of a tribe once inhabiting Cabot Cove has a land grant claiming the town as Indian territory.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Visiting her nephew Grady in New York, Jessica probes a murder involving the family of his college buddy.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: Who Threw the Barbitals in Mrs. Fletcher's Chowder?
programme.desc: Amos Tupper must entertain his sister who has left her husband, but complications arise when his brother-in-law is murdered.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An unhappy wife, a government official, a lovesick assistant and a self-centered astronomer are suspects in the murder of a young executive.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's friend is hit by a car shortly after being notified of her sister's death.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The descendant of a tribe once inhabiting Cabot Cove has a land grant claiming the town as Indian territory.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Visiting her nephew Grady in New York, Jessica probes a murder involving the family of his college buddy.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When Seth's estranged brother is murdered, Jessica must figure out if a cursed ruby from India is responsible.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When Jessica visits a celebrated playwright friend, she encounters murder and an unexpected marriage proposal.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica hears the confession of a dying hit man who has just completed an assignment, only to find the victim isn't dead.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: A Very Good Year for Murder
programme.desc: Jessica suspects heirs and employees when a corpse appears in an elderly vintner's (Eli Wallach) cellar.

programme.title: Curious Caterer Mysteries
programme.desc: Goldy agrees to cater an elaborate wedding, but a dead groom and a missing bridezilla brings her together with Tom again.

programme.title: Curious Caterer Mysteries
programme.desc: Goldy Berry's medieval feast at Hyde Castle gets interrupted by a murder. She teams up with Detective Schultz to solve the mystery before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Curious Caterer Mysteries
programme.desc: Goldy Berry caters a VIP concert and goes on a date with Tom.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries
programme.desc: When Tess prepares for a crossword challenge against a supercomputer, the engineer behind it gets murdered, spurring her and Logan to seek answers before they become the next victims.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries
programme.desc: Tess gets invited to be part of a popular game show, but when the host is unexpectedly murdered, she and Detective Logan O'Connor try to discover who was behind it all.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tipline Mysteries
programme.desc: A cryptic call about a planned jewelry heist draws a Detroit tip-line operator into a dangerous homicide case alongside a newly promoted detective.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After an eccentric recluse dies, arguments over a piece of historic Cabot Cove property and the contents of her estate lead to murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A rude maître d' (Dick Gautier) is murdered at the New York restaurant in which Jessica has just invested.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica probes a suspicious accident while visiting her niece (Kristy McNichol) on the Canadian rodeo circuit.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When the feud of two drama critics ends in murder, Jessica has a full cast of suspects, including the surviving critic.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is caught in a game of deadly politics when a close friend's campaign is threatened by scandal.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After an eccentric recluse dies, arguments over a piece of historic Cabot Cove property and the contents of her estate lead to murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A rude maître d' (Dick Gautier) is murdered at the New York restaurant in which Jessica has just invested.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica probes a suspicious accident while visiting her niece (Kristy McNichol) on the Canadian rodeo circuit.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When Jessica is arrested for murder, secret agent Michael Haggerty (Len Cariou) and her nephew Grady conspire to keep her safely in jail while they seek the real killer.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a fund-raiser for a New York publisher, and he is found dead, and his wife's diamond necklace is missing from his safe.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates when bodies start turning up in the Apple-tree sisters' (Joan Leslie, Teresa Wright) house and garden.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the murders of U.S. World Cup skiers while snowed in at a ski area holding tryouts.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries
programme.desc: Archaeologist Emma Fielding unearths evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement that predates Jamestown, but the dead body that accompanies it embroils Emma and her students in a different kind of investigation.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries
programme.desc: While hosting a gathering of the Association for the Study of American Archaeology, Emma Fielding is thrust into the middle of a murder mystery when the president of her organization is poisoned on the eve of announcing her successor.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries
programme.desc: Emma is hired to consult on the acquisition of a castle-like estate that local legends claim carries a curse.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Mum's the Word
programme.desc: With help from a former Marine (Brennan Elliott), a widow (Brooke Shields) investigates a murder after her friend becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Snipped in the Bud
programme.desc: A small-town florist (Brooke Shields) becomes a prime suspect in the murder of a former courtroom adversary.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Dearly Depotted
programme.desc: Abby Knight is a beautiful ex-attorney and proprietor of Bloomers, a quaint Illinois flower shop.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica becomes embroiled in a town's tensions while investigating the shooting death of a coal mine owner.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Searching for a stolen tiara, Jessica meets the reclusive actress (Jean Peters) for whom it was designed.
